query:
SELECT u.id, u.username, u.email, s.id as subscription_id, st.name as tier_name 
FROM `users` u 
LEFT JOIN `subscriptions` s ON u.id = s.userId 
LEFT JOIN `subscriptionTiers` st ON s.tierId = st.id 
WHERE u.username = 'test11' OR u.email LIKE '%test11%';
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3JZ9fT9capQqaJ5.root --database 7Q8gdiHiBpSXUrkFz6JMfV --execute SELECT u.id, u.username, u.email, s.id as subscription_id, st.name as tier_name 
FROM `users` u 
LEFT JOIN `subscriptions` s ON u.id = s.userId 
LEFT JOIN `subscriptionTiers` st ON s.tierId = st.id 
WHERE u.username = 'test11' OR u.email LIKE '%test11%';
